rootCause.activation: Any conversation memory made the detector default to Level 4, even without a reference marker.
rootCause.topicBoundary: No semantic domain or new-topic decision existed before activation.
rootCause.answerBuilder: The unmatched Level 4 branch always returned the business recommendation.
rootCause.reasoning: Previous selected/ranked context had no eligibility guard.
rootCause.followUp: Number references were start-anchored, so 'So number 3' reported the wrong activation level.

failingPath: memory exists -> unmatched message defaults Level 4 -> generic Level 4 branch -> readiness recommendation
